answer.text:
Dear Finn,

 

Since EGALYT05 and EGALYT02 is under same location EGALY, so impossible to create an ocean(trunk or feeder) link between 2 them.

If the Delivery Term of the bookings can change to CY, then we can create a inland link of EGALYT05-EGALYT02 (similar as carrier’s haulage route) , if it must be Free Out term at EGALY, then the route only can be POL=CNTAOT02 ~POD=EGALYT05.  As for the movements, Terminal T/S costs and feeder charge if any, it has to be settled manually.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年3月10日 20:00
收件人: Fr

qa_pairs.subject: System Incident Notification: Allegro Upgrade Issue

question.text:
Dear Colleagues,

 

We would like to inform you that a technical issue occurred during today’s scheduled midday upgrade of the Allegro system.

 

Our technical team is actively working to resolve the issue. The system will be restarted at 4:00 PM (GMT +8) today and is expected to be fully restored within approximately 30 minutes after the restart. We will keep you updated once any progress.

 

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience and cooperation.

 

Should you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

 

Kind regards,

 

Digital & IT Department

answer.text:
Dear Siti,

As shown in the screenshot , both highlighted lines meet the conditions, and No. 2 has a higher priority than No. 8, so the system picked No. 2 first.

If you want No. 8 to take priority, you can do any of the following:

1.	
	Change the Validity From Date of No. 8 to a later date than No. 2
2.	
	Add one more condition to No. 8, for example Cargo Type
3.	
	Reorder them so that No. 8 is placed before No. 2


Any of these will make No. 8 take higher priority.





Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mailto:kieranji@culines.com> 

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/>
